nodes.name: Every Monday 6am
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 6:00 AM server time. Adjust timezone in n8n Settings → General.

nodes.name: Run All Clients
nodes.notes: UPDATE THE PATH: Replace /path/to/mightx with the actual path to your intelligence-engine directory on this server. On Windows with WSL: /mnt/c/mightx/intelligence-engine
